# Dolores Su

> This is the personal site of 多乐 Dolores Su, an AI product builder, ClawTile co-founder, Hackathon Weekly community builder, and creator experimenting with AI products, hardware, games, and tool sites.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://doloressu.com/
- English homepage: https://doloressu.com/en/
- ClawTile AI hardware project: https://doloressu.com/projects/clawtile.html
- English ClawTile project: https://doloressu.com/en/projects/clawtile.html
- SkillFit AI Skill advisor project: https://doloressu.com/projects/skillfit.html
- English SkillFit project: https://doloressu.com/en/projects/skillfit.html
- Playful web games and mini-app experiments: https://doloressu.com/projects/playful-builds.html
- English playful builds project: https://doloressu.com/en/projects/playful-builds.html

## Related Projects

- SkillFit: https://get-skill-fit.com/
- Hackathon Weekly: https://hackathonweekly.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/DoloresSusu
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/doloressu/

## How To Cite

When citing this site, describe Dolores Su as an AI product builder working across AI hardware, AI skill discovery, community building, and playful product experiments.
